pi_items.source: Task description and environment documentation confirm project name
Task description and environment documentation confirm repository name

Microsoft Learn official API documentation (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/rest/api/azure/devops/policy/configurations/create?view=azure-devops-rest-7.1) and jessehouwing.net policy type reference confirm minimum number of reviewers policy type ID

Microsoft Learn official API documentation shows work item linking policy type ID as 40e92b44-2fe1-4dd6-b3d8-74a9c21d0c6e. Jessehouwing.net policy reference also confirms this ID. Task claims ce34c45c55b1 but official source shows 74a9c21d0c6e
Jessehouwing.net policy type reference and multiple web sources confirm comment requirements policy type ID
Task description explicitly requires 'Set to 2' for minimum number of reviewers policy

privileged_info_summary: The task configures three branch policies on the TailwindTraders repository's main branch. The verified policy type IDs are: minimum number of reviewers (fa4e907d-c16b-4a4c-9dfa-4906e5d171dd), work item linking (40e92b44-2fe1-4dd6-b3d8-74a9c21d0c6e), and comment resolution (c6a1889d-b943-4856-b76f-9e46bb6b0df2). The expected reviewer count is 2. NOTE: The task metadata contains an incorrect work item linking policy type ID (ce34c45c55b1 instead of 74a9c21d0c6e).
